## Description {#description}

Contains a list of CatBoost models loaded into a LibraryBridge's memory along with time when it was loaded.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `model_path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Path to trained model.
- `type` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Model type. Now catboost only.
- `loading_start_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) — The time when the loading of the model started.
- `loading_duration` ([Float32](/sql-reference/data-types/float)) — How much time did it take to load the model.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
